title: Building Custom AI Tools for Email Marketing with Neuron
author: Kevin Chen
excerpt: Explore how Laravel Mail uses Neuron's tool system to create custom AI capabilities tailored specifically for email marketing.
content:
One of Neuron's most powerful features is its tool system—a way to give AI agents capabilities beyond conversation. At Laravel Mail, we've built custom tools that extend our AI agents with email marketing-specific functionality, creating a truly tailored solution.

Neuron's tool system allows you to define custom capabilities for AI agents, enabling them to perform specific tasks within your domain.

Understanding AI Tools

AI tools are functions that agents can call to perform specific actions—querying databases, calling APIs, or processing data. Tools transform AI from a chat interface into an actionable system.

Custom Tools We've Built

Lead Lookup

Query lead data to personalize content based on subscriber information.

Campaign Analytics

Retrieve real-time performance data to inform content decisions.

A/B Test Manager

Create and manage A/B tests through natural language.

Template Renderer

Render email templates with dynamic content.

Toolkits for Email Marketing

Neuron allows us to group related tools into toolkits—composable capabilities that give agents specific skill sets. Our email marketing toolkit gives our AI agents everything they need to manage campaigns end-to-end.

At Laravel Mail, these toolkits power our AI assistant, allowing you to manage campaigns through natural language commands.

The strongly-typed nature of Neuron means our tools are well-documented and TypeScript-friendly, making development fast and error-free.

Benefits for Users

Custom tools enable capabilities that generic AI can't match. Our agents understand email marketing specifics—they know about deliverability, segmentation, and conversion optimization because we've built tools that give them that knowledge.

Experience AI that truly understands email marketing at Laravel Mail.
